title: Getting Around Miami
subtitle: Move between downtown, the fan fest, and the coast — without guessing which train is which.
matchDayNote: Hard Rock Stadium is not on Metromover or Metrorail. Plan Uber/Lyft or bus for match days; use the options below for downtown and regional trips.

options.name: Metromover
options.description: Elevated people-mover loops through the urban core. Perfect for Brickell, Bayfront Park, Bayside Marketplace, and connecting to Brightline at MiamiCentral.
options.fanTip: Use Metromover for fan fest nights — no fare, no parking stress downtown.

options.name: Metrorail
options.description: Paid rail from Miami International Airport through downtown to Dadeland and beyond. Transfer to Metromover at Government Center.
options.fanTip: Airport → Government Center, then hop on Metromover to the waterfront.

options.name: Metrobus
options.description: County-wide bus network for neighborhoods and routes rail doesn't reach. Use the trip planner for stadium and hotel connections.
options.price: Paid — same fare system as Metrorail
options.fanTip: Best when your hotel or match-day stop isn't near a rail station.

options.name: Brightline
options.description: Private train from MiamiCentral downtown to Aventura, Fort Lauderdale, Boca Raton, West Palm Beach, and Orlando. Steps from Bayside and Metromover.
options.price: Paid — book ahead for best fares
options.fanTip: MiamiCentral connects to Metrorail, Metrobus, and Metromover — one hub for downtown.
